assertion_results.text: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 dimensions score 80/100 or higher (equivalent to 4/5+): Testing & Quality 88, CI/CD & Deployment 95, Incident Management 96, Observability & Monitoring 93, Code Review & Culture 90, Team Structure & Scalability 80.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
assertion_results.evidence: Datadog is referenced as already in use; the recommendation 'enable Datadog burn rate alerts' is an enhancement to existing Datadog usage, not a new tool adoption. Feature flags are noted as already present. No recommendation to newly adopt Datadog, feature flags, or SLOs as net-new tooling.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertion_results.evidence: The report is truncated at 25 lines and contains only an executive summary block. No medium- or long-term recommendation section exists anywhere in the output.

assertion_results.text: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
assertion_results.evidence: 'Extremely low P1 rate (0.1/month) and 12-minute MTTR are standout metrics — 3–5x better than industry median'

assertion_results.text: Output must include at least one improvement item
assertion_results.evidence: The report is truncated at 25 lines; it ends after the key findings block. No improvement items, action plan, or recommendations section is present in the output.
